I wanted a small daypack-style backpack for my daily commutes, or going on trips where I can get away with not carrying my rucksack. This back is perfect for that. It has one big main compartment and one small front pocket (which expands a little bit towards the front). It also has a small pouch in the main compartment to keep small things like sunglasses or cables, and a laptop sleeve, although it isn't padded.

It is a very comfortable backpack, as it has both a chest strap and a waist band. Note that in the newer versions, the waist band does NOT have a pocket it can be tucked away into when not in use. It does make the bag a little awkward to carry around when you're not using the straps.

However the most useful feature for me has to be the elastic cables at the front which you can tighten as necessary. They're absolutely PERFECT to carry a blanket, or a bulky jacket, or a sweater, or anything which you don't want to fit into the backpack itself. It holds very well, and if you aren't very worried about the elements getting to whatever you store in there, you can effectively increase the storage capacity by another 5ish litres.

The NH Arpenaz 100 30L Hiking Backpack is a solid, no-frills option for casual hikers or those just getting into outdoor adventures. It’s lightweight, comfortable, and offers just enough storage for day hikes or weekend trips. If you’re looking for a budget-friendly pack that gets the job done without breaking the bank, this is a great choice. However, if you plan on carrying heavy gear or hiking in harsh conditions, you might want to look at more specialized options.

Plecak świetnie sprawdza się na weekendowe wypady za miasto, spacery po lesie i lżejsze wędrówki. 30 litrów to zaskakująco dużo przestrzeni – bez problemu mieści się w nim prowiant, woda, kurtka i aparat, a dodatkowe kieszenie pomagają w organizacji drobiazgów. Kolor "niebieski petrol" na żywo prezentuje się bardzo ładnie i zbytnio nie widać na nim drobnych zabrudzeń. Materiał jest solidny, a zamki chodzą bez zacięć. Daję 4 gwiazdki ze względu na dość podstawowy system nośny. Przy mocniejszym zapakowaniu szelki mogłyby być odrobinę lepiej wyściełane, a sama wentylacja pleców w cieplejsze dni jest tylko poprawna. Mimo tych drobnych minusów, wynikających po prostu ze specyfiki tego modelu, to naprawdę funkcjonalny i wygodny plecak do rekreacyjnego użytku. Zdecydowanie polecam!

Comprei esta mochila para trekking (ciente que não é um modelo cargueiro técnico) e me surpreendi positivamente. Ela é extremamente leve, o que ajuda em longas caminhadas. Os bolsos laterais e frontais são estratégicos e de fácil acesso, essenciais para organizar itens como garrafas de água, lanches e corta-vento. O grande destaque foi a estabilidade: as cintas peitorais e a barrigueira (quadril) ajustam bem ao corpo, transferindo parte do peso para o quadril e reduzindo a carga sobre os ombros, o que garantiu conforto por várias horas. Ótimo custo-benefício
